hero.description: AutoApply AI discovers relevant jobs, scores your compatibility, and generates ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters — all tailored to each specific role.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. 3 free tailored documents per month.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps from upload to application-ready documents.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload your master CV (PDF, DOCX, or paste text). We extract and structure your experience.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell us your target roles, locations, salary range, and remote preferences. We search every 4 hours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: For each matching job, get a tailored CV and cover letter — ATS-optimized, zero fabrication.

features.title: Built for Serious Job Seekers
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to maximize your chances while keeping your data safe.
features.smartDiscoveryDesc: Aggregates listings from Adzuna, The Muse, Remotive, and more — all from official APIs. No scraping, no ToS violations.
features.aiScoringDesc: Each job is scored 0-100 against your profile based on skills match (40%), experience (25%), education (15%), and domain relevance (20%).
features.atsDocumentsDesc: Tailored resume and cover letter per job, optimized for Applicant Tracking Systems. Keywords injected naturally from your real experience.
features.automatedPipelineDesc: Set preferences once. Every 4 hours, new matching jobs are discovered and documents prepared automatically for your review.
features.privacyFirstDesc: GDPR-compliant. No credential storage. No automated logins. Your data stays yours with one-click export and deletion.
features.antiHallucinationDesc: Zero tolerance for fabricated content. AI only reorders, rephrases, and emphasizes what's already in your CV. Nothing invented.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to supercharge your job search.
pricing.creditPackDesc: Need more credits? Get a Credit Pack — 10 additional documents for $19 (one-time).

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Job Search?
cta.subtitle: Join job seekers who are landing interviews faster with AI-tailored applications.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Tips, guides, and insights on AI-powered job searching, CV optimization, and career growth.
blog.noPosts: No blog posts available yet. Check back soon!
blog.ctaTitle: Ready to land your dream job?
blog.ctaDescription: Let AutoApply AI tailor your CV and cover letter for every application.

roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.description: See what we've built, what we're working on, and what's coming next.
roadmap.suggestDesc: We'd love to hear your ideas. Let us know what would make AutoApply AI even better for your job search.
roadmap.builtInPublicDesc: See what we're building and what's coming next.
roadmap.item_ai_cv_desc: Tailored resume for every job, ATS-optimized with your real experience.
roadmap.item_cover_letter_desc: Personalized cover letter per job, matching your profile to the role.
roadmap.item_job_apis_desc: Adzuna, The Muse, Remotive, Arbeitnow, JSearch, Jooble, Reed.
roadmap.item_kanban_desc: Drag-and-drop application management across all stages.
roadmap.item_languages_desc: Full support for English, French, German, Spanish, Italian.
roadmap.item_gdpr_desc: Data export and one-click account deletion.
roadmap.item_anti_hallucination_desc: Zero fabricated content — only your real experience is used.
roadmap.item_pipeline_desc: New matching jobs discovered every 4 hours automatically.
roadmap.item_mobile_desc: Native iOS and Android app for managing your job search on the go.
roadmap.item_notifications_desc: Instant alerts when new matching jobs are found.
roadmap.item_analytics_desc: Track your application success rates and optimize your strategy.
roadmap.item_chrome_desc: 1-click tailor your CV from any job listing page.
roadmap.item_interview_desc: Practice questions generated from the actual job description.
roadmap.item_linkedin_desc: Paste any LinkedIn job URL to instantly tailor your documents.
roadmap.item_alerts_desc: Custom notification frequency and advanced filters.
roadmap.item_tone_desc: Choose between formal, casual, or creative writing styles.
roadmap.item_teams_desc: Multi-user accounts for recruiters and career coaches.
roadmap.item_salary_desc: AI-powered scripts and strategies for salary discussions.
roadmap.item_mock_desc: Video-based interview practice with AI feedback.
roadmap.item_skills_desc: Identify missing skills and get course recommendations.

footer.tagline: AI-powered career assistant. ATS-optimized, zero fabrication.
footer.officialApis: All job data sourced from official APIs only. No scraping.
